messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao on-premises. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Teams with Groups

### Estrutura

```
Team: Platform
├── Group: Platform-Admins
├── Group: Platform-Developers
└── Group: Platform-Viewers
```

### Policies

```bash
Allow group Platform-Admins to manage all-resources in compartment platform
```

### Riscos
- Group sprawl
